member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMetrics
member.summary: Timing metrics

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMetrics.SetImage
member.summary: Time taken to set an image

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMetrics.ForegroundPaint
member.summary: Time taken to paint the foreground, including any overlays

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMetrics.BackgroundPaint
member.summary: Time taken to paint the background

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMode
member.summary: Bitmap display modes

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMode.FitToWindowCentred
member.summary: Centre the image and make as large as possible within the bounds of the display

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMode.ActualSizeCentred
member.summary: Centre the image and set to the zoom to 1

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMode.Free
member.summary: Allow the image zoom and location to change, either programmatically or via the mouse

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayMode.Locked
member.summary: Don't change the zoom or location settings at any time under any circumstances

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel
member.summary: Displays a bitmap

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.CDS
member.summary: Provides access to all the custom features
member.remarks: Allows code to use myPanel.CDS.XXX rather than myPanel.XXX - this makes it a little easier to discover and use the custom features of this panel since a .Net control presents 100's of properties, events and methods!

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.#ctor
member.summary: Initialise - configures for double buffered display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.DragManager_SetNewTargetDisplayCentre(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Drag manager wants to set a new display centre

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.ZoomManager_SetNewZoom(System.Single,System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Zoom manager wants to set a new zoom

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.VirtualImageOnDisplay_OnPaintRectChanged(CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay,System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: The virtual display wants to set a new paint rect

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.DropBitmap
member.summary: Drop the current image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.SetNonNullBitmap(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: Takes a copy of a new image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.CopyBitmapToExistingBitmap(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: Copies the contents of a new image to our existing image store

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.CreateNewBitmapFromBitmap(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: Creates a copy of the new image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.SetNullImage
member.summary: Configures for no image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.DropBitmapIfFormatOrSizeChanged(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: Drops the current image store if the format or size is different to the new bitmap

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnPaintBackground(System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: Paint the background (optimised when there's nothing to display)

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnPaint(System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: Paint the image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.PaintBitmap(System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs)
member.summary: Draws the image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnMouseWheel(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Use has used the mouse wheel - we use this for zoom

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnSizeChanged(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Size has changed - refresh the display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnMouseMove(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Mouse has moved - we can use this for dragging

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnMouseDown(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Mouse button down - we can use this for dragging

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.BitmapDisplayPanel.OnMouseUp(System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs)
member.summary: Mouse button is up - we can use this for dragging

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.Consts
member.summary: Constants for the module

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.Consts.MinZoom
member.summary: Minimum zoom level

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.Consts.MaxZoom
member.summary: Maximum zoom level

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.Consts.SnapToZoom1Tolerance
member.summary: When the target zoom is within this value of 1.0f it will snap to 1.0f

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.OnPaintRectChangedCallback
member.summary: Callback delegate

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.PaintOverEvent
member.summary: Event delegate

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.PaintUnderEvent
member.summary: Event delegate

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.ModeChangedEvent
member.summary: Event delegate

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay
member.summary: Behaviour for a bitmap display control

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.PaintRect
member.summary: Gets the paint rectangle. This is based on the current image size, display size, zoom, target image centre and target display centre.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.Image
member.summary: Gets the image currently being rendered. This is owned by the display control and should not be modified by clients.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.AnythingToDisplay
member.summary: True if there's anything to display

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.Mode
member.summary: The image display mode

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.TimingMetrics
member.summary: Timing metrics

member.name: E:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.PaintOver
member.summary: Called when the image has been rendered; gives a client an opportunity to paint graphics on top of the image. This will be flicker-free as long as the control uses double buffering

member.name: E:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.PaintUnder
E:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.DisplayModeChanged
member.summary: Called when the display mode is changed.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.MapImageToDisplay(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Returns the display location where a pixel at would be drawn.
member.remarks:
This is useful when you want to overlay graphics on the image with respect to the image regardless of the current zoom and display settings.
When the zoom is large each image pixel will occupy several display pixels. The returned coordinate is at the top-left of this region. The property can be used if the drawing should use the centre of the rendered pixels.
member.returns: A rectangle on the display or an empty rectangle if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.MapImageToDisplay(System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Returns the display location where a rectangle at would be drawn.
member.remarks:
This is useful when you want to overlay graphics on the image with respect to the image regardless of the current zoom and display settings.
When the zoom is large each image pixel will occupy several display pixels. The location of the returned rectangle is at the top-left of this region. The location is at the top-left of this region. The property can be used if the drawing should use the centre of the rendered pixels.
member.returns: A rectangle on the display or an empty rectangle if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.MapDisplayToImage(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Returns the image location where a pixel at would have been drawn.
member.remarks: This is useful when you have used the mouse to select a region of interest (rectangle) over the image and want to deteremine the ROI with respect to the image.
member.returns: A region on the display or an empty rectangle if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.MapDisplayToImage(System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Returns the image location where a rectangle at would have been drawn.
member.remarks: This is useful when you have used the mouse to select a region of interest (rectangle) over the image and want to deteremine the ROI with respect to the image.
member.returns: A region on the display or an empty rectangle if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.SetImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap)
member.summary: Set the image to display. A copy is taken and the reference is not retained. Passing null delegates to . The geometry is not changed if an image of the same size is already displayed. Otherwise the current is respected but

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.ClearImage
member.summary: Removes the displayed image

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.Centre
member.summary: Centres the image on the display, retaining the existing zoom level. Only applied if the display mode is , no-op otherwise.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.FitToWindowCentred
member.summary: Centres the image on the display and adjusts the zoom so that the image fills the display as much as possible. Only applied if the display mode is , no-op otherwise.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.ActualSizeCentred
member.summary: Centres the image on the display and sets the zoom to 1. Only applied if the display mode is , no-op otherwise.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.ResetZoom
member.summary: Reset the zoom to 1:1

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.ZoomIn
member.summary: Zoom in

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.ZoomOut
member.summary: Zoom out

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.Zoom
member.summary: Set/get the zoom level. The limits in the class are used.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.TargetImageCentre
member.summary: The location in the image that should be rendered at .

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.TargetDisplayCentre
member.summary: The location on the display that should render the pixel in the image at location .

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.IBitmapDisplay.SizeOfHalfDisplayPixel
member.summary: The size of half a displayed pixel
member.remarks: Use this as an offset when drawing with a large zoom and where the drawing locations should be in the middle of an image pixel. E.g. with a zoom of 11, each image pixel will take 11*11 pixels on the screen. The half pixel size will be 5.5. Calling will return the location of the top-left of this 11*11 block for a particular image pixel; adding this offset of 5.5 will allow drawing to start in the middle of this 11*11 block.

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay
member.summary: Provides the drawing rectangle needed to render an image under specific zoom and location conditions.

remarks.para: The paint rectangle is calculated such that the will be rendered at the , with the size of the rectangle being based on the and level.

The paint rectangle calculation is: x: targetDisplayCentre.X - (targetImageCentre.X * zoom) y: targetDisplayCentre.Y - (targetImageCentre.Y * zoom) width: imageSize.Width* zoom height: imageSize.Height* zoom

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.SizeOfHalfDisplayPixel
member.summary: The size of half a display pixel
member.remarks: When the zoom is large a single image pixel will occupy several display pixels. Often, when drawing overlays, you want to use the centre of these display pixels to map to the centre of the image pixel; this property gives the adjustment to make to a display location for this offset.

member.name: F:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.OnPaintRectChanged
member.summary: Called whenever changes

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.AnythingToDisplay
member.summary: True if there is anything to display

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.Zoom
member.summary: The current zoom level, clipped to and . If the target is within it will snap to 1.0f.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.TargetImageCentre
member.summary: Gets/sets the target image centre. Changes are only accepted in mode; otherwise they are ignored. The will be recalculated and called if it changes.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.TargetDisplayCentre
member.summary: Gets/sets the target display centre. Changes are only accepted in mode; otherwise they are ignored. The will be recalculated and called if it changes.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.PaintRect
member.summary: Gets the paint rectangle

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.ImageSize
member.summary: Gets/sets the image size. The target image centre is recalculated to be the centre of the image. The is recalculated.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.DisplaySize
member.summary: Gets/sets the display size. The target display centre is recalculated to be the centre of the display. The is recalculated.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.Mode
member.summary: Gets/sets the display mode. The is recalculated.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.ForceApplyCurrentAutomaticMode
member.summary: Recalculates the paint rect based on the current mode. E.g. even if the mode has not been changed, and we're in fit to window, we'll recalculate the appropriate rectangle based on the current image/display size and target centres.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.#ctor(CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.OnPaintRectChangedCallback)
member.summary: Initialise
member.param: A callback which is fired whenever the has changed.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.RecalculatePaintRect
member.summary: Recalculates the paint rect, or sets to empty if there's nothing to paint.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.MapImageToDisplay(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Returns the display location where a pixel at would be drawn.
member.remarks:
This is useful when you want to overlay graphics on the image with respect to the image locations regardless of the current zoom and display settings.
When the zoom is large each image pixel will occupy several display pixels. This returned location is at the top-left of this region.
member.returns: A location on the display or an empty point if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.MapDisplayToImage(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Returns the image location where a pixel at would have been drawn.
member.remarks: This is useful when you want to determine the image location under the current mouse location.
member.returns: A location on the image or an empty point if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.MapDisplayToImage(System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Returns the image location where a rectangle at would have been drawn.
member.remarks: This is useful when you have used the mouse to select a region of interest (rectangle) over the image and want to deteremine the ROI with respect to the image.
member.returns: A region on the display or an empty rectangle if there's nothing to display

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.ActualSizeCentred
member.summary: Centre the image and set to 1:1 zoom. Only applies if the mode is , otherwise does nothing.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.ForceActualSizeCentred
member.summary: Force the image be be centred and drawn with 1:1 zoom, regardless of the current mode

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.Centre
member.summary: Centres the image. Only applies if the mode is , otherwise does nothing.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.ForceCentre
member.summary: Forces the image to be centred on the display, regardless of the current display mode

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.FitToWindowCentred
member.summary: Centres the image and adjusts the zoom so the image is as large as possible within the display. Only applies if the mode is , otherwise does nothing.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.ForceFitToWindowCentred
member.summary: Centres the image and adjusts the zoom so the image is as large as possible within the display, regardless of the current display mode.

member.name: M:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.BitmapDisplay.VirtualDisplay.MapImageToDisplay(System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Returns the display location where a rectangle at would be drawn.
member.remarks:
This is useful when you want to overlay graphics on the image with respect to the image regardless of the current zoom and display settings.
When the zoom is large each image pixel will occupy several display pixels. The location of the returned rectangle is at the top-left of this region.
member.returns: A rectangle on the display or an empty rectangle if there's nothing to display

member.summary: Draws a cross hair

member.summary: Pen for drawing the cross hair lines

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimpleCrossHair.EllipseEnabled
member.summary: True to draw the ellipse

member.name: T:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen
member.summary: A simple pen; allows configuration within the designer

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen.Pen
member.summary: The .Net Pen

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets the color of this System.Drawing.Pen.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of this System.Drawing.Pen, in units of the System.Drawing.Graphics object used for drawing.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen.EndCap
member.summary: Gets or sets the cap style used at the end of lines drawn with this System.Drawing.Pen.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen.StartCap
member.summary: Gets or sets the cap style used at the beginning of lines drawn with this System.Drawing.Pen.

member.name: P:CDS.Imaging.WinForms.Draw.SimplePen.DashStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the style used for dashed lines drawn with this System.Drawing.Pen.

member.summary: Initialise

member.summary: Initialise

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Concert to a .Net pen
